sizing_rule.note: Options position sizing via probability-weighted HPR optimization. Size determined by testing f values that maximize geometric mean across all possible price outcomes at predetermined exit date. Requires: time to expiration, underlying price, option price, volatility estimate, and probability distribution of outcomes.

source_rule_text: Position sizing for options should be determined by calculating probability-weighted HPRs across all possible outcomes at a predetermined exit date, using the optimal f value that maximizes geometric growth.
